text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week appears to be feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I never feel rested lately, no matter how much I sleep.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Even though I've been able to run in so many of
the Twinkle Series races that I always dreamed
of...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but please don't worry! I'm sure I'll snap out
of this funk in no time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I need to rethink her race schedule to
keep her from burning out...
